basic_details.job_title: NCRTC Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Senior Deputy General Manager and Assistant Manager Posts
basic_details.post_name: Senior Deputy General Manager and Assistant Manager
basic_details.short_information: National Capital Region Transport Corporation (NCRTC) has released the official Transport Planner Executives Recruitment Notification 2026 under Advt. No. 27/2026. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced under the NCRTC Transport Planner Executives Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates up to 45 years of age and holding a Master of Transport Planning/ Transport Engineering with a B.E./ B.Tech (Civil), B.Plan., or B.Arch. (Full Time) can apply online until 17 August 2026. The official notification PDF and online application link are available below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years Age Relaxation: SC/ ST: 5 Years, OBC-NCL: 3 Years, PwBD: 10 Years, Ex-Serviceman: 5 Years

qualification.education_qualification: Master of Transport Planning/ Transport Engineering with B.E./ B. Tech. (Civil)/ B. Plan./ B. Arch. (Full Time)
qualification.details: Sr. Deputy General Manager/ Transport Planner & Assistant Manager/ Transport Planner: Master of Transport Planning/ Transport Engineering with B.E./ B. Tech. (Civil)/ B. Plan./ B. Arch. (Full Time)

vacancy_details.Post Name: Sr. Deputy General Manager/ Transport Planner

post_wise_breakdown.post_name: Sr. Deputy General Manager/ Transport Planner

salary_details.details: Sr. Deputy General Manager/ Transport Planner: Rs. 80000-220000 (IDA) Per Month Assistant Manager/ Transport Planner: Rs. 50000-160000 (IDA) Per Month

selection_process: Written Test/ CBT Interview Document Verification Merit List
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 17-08-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NCRTC to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NCRTC Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the NCRTC Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download NCRTC Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: NCRTC Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Written Test/ CBT Interview Document Verification Merit List

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 17-08-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NCRTC to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NCRTC Transport Planner Executives posts?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the NCRTC Transport Planner Executives posts is 17 August 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies released by NCRTC?
faq.answer: NCRTC has released a total of 3 vacancies for the post of Transport Planner Executives. These vacancies are distributed across different positions within the organization.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: The required educational qualification is a Master of Transport Planning/ Transport Engineering with a B.E./ B. Tech. (Civil)/ B. Plan./ B. Arch. (Full Time). Ensure you meet this criterion before applying.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the applicants?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all posts is 45 years. However, age relaxation is provided for SC/ST, OBC-NCL, PwBD, and Ex-Serviceman categories as per government rules.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for NCRTC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Transport Planner Executives posts?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from Rs. 50000 to Rs. 220000 per month, depending on the specific post. The Sr. Deputy General Manager post offers a higher scale than the Assistant Manager post.

faq.question: Q7. How will candidates be selected for the NCRTC posts?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Written Test/CBT, followed by an Interview. Candidates who clear these stages will then undergo Document Verification, and a final Merit List will be prepared.

faq.question: Q8. In which mode can candidates apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates can apply for the NCRTC Transport Planner Executives posts through the online mode only. The application link will be available on the official website.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The posts of Transport Planner Executives are on a contractual basis. This means the employment will be for a fixed tenure as per the terms and conditions of the contract.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the NCRTC located?
faq.answer: The National Capital Region Transport Corporation (NCRTC) is based in Delhi, with the city being New Delhi and the pincode 110023. This recruitment is specifically for candidates in this region.
